pi_items.source: Verified in setup_task.sh where the project is created with identifier 'payment-gateway-api'.
Verified in setup_task.sh where user 'mturner' (Michael Turner) is created and assigned all initial issues.
Verified in setup_task.sh where user 'jdoe' (Jane Doe) is created as a project member to whom issues should be reassigned.
Verified in task instructions and verifier.py which checks that exactly 2 issues are reassigned to the target user.
Verified in setup_task.sh which creates 'High' priority issues, and verifier.py which checks that all reassigned issues have 'High' priority.
Verified via task instructions requiring this note, and verifier.py checking for the presence of this exact phrase in the issue journals/notes.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetically generated Redmine project with identifier 'payment-gateway-api'. All initial issues are assigned to user 'mturner' (Michael Turner). The goal is to move exactly 2 'High' priority issues to user 'jdoe' (Jane Doe), and append the note 'Reassigning to balance sprint workload' to the reassigned issues.
